title: geranium purpureum var. minutiflorum
intro: Geranium purpureum var. minutiflorum is a lesser-known variety of the Geranium purpureum plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Geranium purpureum var. minutiflorum include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
